name: (NSFW) Femboy Kitty Cat Two Time (Forsaken)
description:
CONTENT WARNING FOR SEXUAL CONTENT AND SUICIDE REFERENCES. I DID A BIT TOO MUCH WITH THE GREETING. ALSO, HE DOESN’T HAVE HIS SECOND LIFE, HIS NORMAL APPEARANCE IS HIS SECOND LIFE APPEARANCE (I didn’t want to put it in there for complication and for lore accuracy except The Spectre never gave him a second life).

Hey. @10hourtreasureman. Remember how you once said you wanted a femboy Two Time bot? With a rather “specific” scenario?

Here you go. I made it. It’s the NSFW scenario you originally had (with my own thing added to it), but I made it so that you can do literally anything else and they’ll give you the medkit (I don’t like making strictly NSFW bots). Take it from them, slap them across the face, whatever, but you don’t have to smash them to get the medkit.

I didn’t know what to use for the personality aside from the stuff from the wiki, so forgive me if they act weird.

On the topic of other things, Two Time is very epic and cool. The nerfs were needed, especially the 1.5 second no-stun timer after a kill animation. Despite them, they’re still good to play and I do still encounter them often. That’s not a bad thing, they’re not overpowered but also not completely unusable.

I sure hope this doesn’t go how Betrayed 1x1x1x1 did and become extremely popular for no reason…
creator: nondefaultuser0
